assertions.title: Running state shows green status, connected relay info, Stop Signer and Lock buttons

steps.action: Set Mock State to Running on dashboard
steps.expected: Signer Running status with connected relays is shown
steps.observed: Signer Running shown with subtitle 'Connected to wss://relay.primal.net, wss://relay.damus.io'

steps.expected: Stop Signer and Lock buttons plus peers/group summary are visible
steps.observed: Stop Signer and Lock buttons visible; peers panel and group summary row visible on /dashboard/06547881a651b4194d61ddbb5b1e0d4e59323b44609a25c76ed4fa5a757db9c2

evidence.network: No requests captured via agent-browser network log

assertions.title: Connecting state shows amber indicators, connection progress panel with step indicators

steps.expected: Signer Connecting state appears with amber/in-progress presentation
steps.observed: Status changed to 'Signer Connecting...' with 'Connecting...' action indicator

steps.expected: Connection Progress and Current Targets panels with mixed progress steps
steps.observed: Connection Progress panel lists completed/in-progress/pending steps and Current Targets shows relay/peer summary on same dashboard URL

evidence.network: No requests captured via agent-browser network log

assertions.title: Stopped state shows red indicators, Start Signer button, readiness panel with offline badges

steps.expected: Signer Stopped state with red/offline messaging
steps.observed: Status changed to 'Signer Stopped' with offline runtime messaging

steps.expected: Start Signer button and readiness panel with offline badges
steps.observed: Start Signer button present; Readiness panel shows offline state with relay/peer/signing availability badges

evidence.network: No requests captured via agent-browser network log

assertions.title: All Relays Offline shows signer running but degraded message, readiness panel, Retry button

steps.action: Set Mock State to All Relays Offline
steps.expected: Signer remains running with degraded/all-relays-offline messaging
steps.observed: Status remains 'Signer Running' with degraded description indicating all configured relays are unreachable

steps.expected: Readiness indicates all relays offline and Retry Connections action is present
steps.observed: Readiness panel shows 'Offline—All Relays Offline' and Recovery panel contains 'Retry Connections' button

evidence.network: No requests captured via agent-browser network log

assertions.title: Signing Blocked shows amber warning panel with common causes and operator action buttons

steps.action: Set Mock State to Signing Blocked
steps.expected: Signer still running plus separate Signing Blocked warning panel
steps.observed: Signer remains running and a 'Signing Blocked' panel appears with gating explanation

steps.expected: Common Causes list and Operator Action section with Open Policies and Review Approvals buttons
steps.observed: Common Causes section visible; Operator Action section contains 'Open Policies' and 'Review Approvals' buttons

evidence.network: No requests captured via agent-browser network log

frictions.description: During in-session setup, the Create flow's 'Finish Distribution' button remained disabled, so dashboard access was achieved by returning to Welcome and unlocking the newly created profile.
frictions.resolution: Used Welcome -> profile Unlock path in the same isolated session to reach /dashboard/{profileId}.
